title: OverCR URL Request v2.5.0
description: Schema for an operator-initiated URL fetch request. Every field is audited; nothing is auto-fetched.

url.description: The exact URL to fetch. Must be http or https.

requested_by.description: Operator identity who initiated the fetch.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the request was made.

project_scope.description: Which OverCR project this fetch belongs to.

purpose.description: Why this URL is being fetched — recorded in provenance.

max_bytes.description: Maximum response size in bytes. Default 512KB.

follow_redirects.description: Whether to follow HTTP 3xx redirects (still blocked for private IPs).

approval_required.description: If true, fetch pauses for operator approval before proceeding.
